name: po
description: Product Owner toolkit — bundles the PO subagent, 4 core PO skills (po-story-writer, po-backlog-groomer, po-sprint-planner, po-stakeholder-bridge), and 7 Built For Mars UX research skills (onboarding, growth, churn-retention, purchases-subscriptions, psychology, benchmarking, teardowns) grounded in 60+ real product case studies. Project-memory recall is delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall (with role=po) so the same generic skill serves all roles.
